name: azure-agentic-infraops
description: Agentic InfraOps - Azure infrastructure engineered by agents. Verified. Well-Architected. Deployable.

scripts.lint:instruction-frontmatter: echo '⚠️  Merged into validate:instruction-checks' && node scripts/validate-instruction-checks.mjs
scripts.validate:instruction-refs: echo '⚠️  Merged into validate:instruction-checks' && node scripts/validate-instruction-checks.mjs
scripts.lint:prose: vale --config .vale.ini docs/ .github/ README.md || echo 'Vale not installed - run: brew install vale'
scripts.lint:yaml: find . \( -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' \) ! -path './node_modules/*' ! -path './infra/*' -exec yamllint -c .yamllint.yml {} \; 2>/dev/null || echo 'yamllint not installed - run: pip install yamllint'
scripts.lint:python: cd mcp/azure-pricing-mcp && python -m ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.lint:python:fix: cd mcp/azure-pricing-mcp && python -m ruff check --fix src/ tests/
scripts.validate:terraform: for dir in infra/terraform/*/; do [ -f "$dir/main.tf" ] && (cd "$dir" && terraform init -backend=false -input=false > /dev/null 2>&1 && terraform validate) || true; done
scripts.lint:skill-size: echo '⚠️  Merged into validate:skill-checks' && node scripts/validate-skill-checks.mjs
scripts.lint:agent-body-size: echo '⚠️  Merged into lint:agent-checks' && node scripts/lint-agent-checks.mjs
scripts.validate:skill-digests: echo '⚠️  Merged into validate:skill-checks' && node scripts/validate-skill-checks.mjs
scripts.lint:agent-language: echo '⚠️  Merged into lint:agent-checks' && node scripts/lint-agent-checks.mjs
scripts.validate:_node: run-p lint:artifact-templates lint:h2-sync lint:version-sync lint:deprecated-refs lint:mcp-config lint:agent-frontmatter lint:skills-format lint:instruction-frontmatter validate:instruction-refs lint:governance-refs validate:session-state validate:session-lock validate:workflow-graph validate:agent-registry validate:skill-affinity validate:skill-checks validate:skill-digests validate:stale-refs lint:json lint:glob-audit lint:skill-references lint:orphaned-content lint:docs-freshness lint:model-alignment lint:agent-checks validate:no-hardcoded-counts validate:hooks validate:iac-security-baseline validate:docs-sync validate:vscode lint:excalidraw
scripts.validate:_node-ci: run-p lint:artifact-templates lint:h2-sync lint:version-sync lint:deprecated-refs lint:mcp-config lint:agent-frontmatter lint:skills-format lint:instruction-frontmatter lint:governance-refs validate:instruction-refs validate:session-state validate:session-lock validate:workflow-graph validate:agent-registry validate:skill-affinity validate:skill-digests lint:json lint:glob-audit lint:skill-references lint:orphaned-content validate:docs-sync validate:vscode
scripts.validate:all: run-p --continue-on-error validate:_node validate:_external && echo '✅ All validations passed'

author: Jonathan Vella
